testsuite.name: com.ynabauto.infrastructure.persistence.FlywayMigrationTest

testcase.name: V1 migration creates app_config table with correct columns()
V1 migration creates amazon_orders table with correct columns()
V1 migration creates sync_logs table with correct columns()
amazon_orders email_message_id has a unique constraint()
V1 migration creates category_rules table with correct columns()
